query: War and Peace Tolstoy how many pages English translation commonly cited
answer: War and Peace, translated into English, commonly has around 1,440 pages in the Penguin Classics edition. This is the most cited length for the English translation.

results.title: War and Peace by Leo Tolstoy - Which translation is best?
results.snippet: War and Peace by Leo Tolstoy. **🏆 *War and Peace* is one of our most recommended books on *Five Books***. *War and Peace* by Leo Tolstoy is regarded by many as one of the greatest novels ever written. As with most of the Russian classics, there are several translations of Tolstoy’s immortal *War and Peace* for the anglophone reader to choose from. Knowing Tolstoy’s propensity to make changes to his texts even after they had been published, the Maudes took care to work with the most accurate version of *War and Peace*. The extensive passages in French in *War and Peace*, for example, were all summarily translated into Russian for the third edition, published in the 1870s, and corrections were made for its fifth edition. Leo Tolstoy, writing in Russky Arkhiv, 1868, quoted in the Norton Critical Edition of War and Peace. ### Other books by Leo Tolstoy.
